name: @tearleads/mls-core
description: Core MLS (RFC 9420) client and storage primitives

scripts.test: sh -c 'if [ "$1" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; if command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1; then bun test "$@"; else vitest run "$@"; fi' -- src/mls.test.ts src/mlsWasmBackend.test.ts
scripts.test:coverage: cross-env DOTENV_CONFIG_QUIET=true sh -c 'if [ "$1" = "--" ]; then shift; fi; if command -v bun >/dev/null 2>&1; then bun test --coverage --max-concurrency="${PRE_PUSH_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS:-4}" "$@"; else vitest run --coverage --max-workers="${PRE_PUSH_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS:-4}" "$@"; fi' --
